name: Mixpanel
description: Monitor Mixpanel product analytics for user data access and privacy compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Mixpanel at https://mixpanel.com
2. Go to Organization Settings → Service Accounts
3. Create a new Service Account
4. Copy the username and secret
5. Base64 encode 'username:secret'
6. Enter the encoded value below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Service Account
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'username:secret' of your Mixpanel Service Account. Create one in Mixpanel → Organization Settings → Service Accounts. Command: echo -n 'username:secret' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Mixpanel service account credentials are active for analytics access

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Mixpanel projects handle user data with appropriate privacy controls
